userStories.title: Define MarketDataProvider protocol and YFinanceProvider
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a typed market-data protocol with a YFinance-backed default so new sources plug in without touching consumers.
acceptanceCriteria: New market-data module defines `MarketDataProvider` protocol with `get_history`, `get_financials`, and `get_earnings` (pandas DataFrame returns)
`YFinanceProvider` implements the protocol using existing yfinance download/history/Ticker patterns
`get_financials` composes with existing `CompositeProvider` (YFinance + EDGAR fallback) — do not duplicate #8 logic
Protocol is `runtime_checkable`; unit tests use mocked yfinance — no network
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Wire ai/helpers.py through MarketDataProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I want index/ticker history and financial helpers to use an injectable provider so ML paths stop importing yfinance directly.
acceptanceCriteria: `get_index_data`, `get_ticker_data`, and financial helper entry points accept optional `MarketDataProvider` (default `YFinanceProvider`)
Existing SQLite cache behaviour for index data preserved (same keys, TTL, validator)
`ai/helpers.py` has no direct `import yfinance`
Tests cover cache hit/miss and provider injection via mock
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Wire fetch_stock_data and finviz data fetching
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want batch OHLCV and finviz classifier data paths on the provider so fetch modules contain no HTTP imports.
acceptanceCriteria: `fetch_stock_data.py` uses `MarketDataProvider` for history, dividends, and earnings events — no direct yfinance import
`ai/finviz_classifier/data_fetching.py` uses provider for ticker history/financials
`ai/fundamental_analysis/valuation_methods.py` accepts provider instead of raw `yf.Ticker`
Behaviour parity on fixture/mock data (OHLCV columns, events DataFrame shape)
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Migrate remaining yfinance consumer modules
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want stock_finder, sector_analysis, sp500_analysis, analyze_stock_data, and linear_reg_sig_days off direct yfinance.
acceptanceCriteria: Listed modules import market data only via `MarketDataProvider` (injected or module-level default)
No `import yfinance` in those consumer modules
Public function signatures unchanged unless optional provider kwarg is additive
Smoke tests with mocked provider where practical
uv run pytest passes

userStories.title: Parity tests and paid-provider extension stub
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want regression tests and a documented stub so FMP/Polygon/Stooq have a clear future hook.
acceptanceCriteria: Parity tests: mock yfinance fixtures produce same DataFrame index/columns as pre-refactor golden snapshots or inline assertions
Stub class or ABC (e.g. `PaidMarketDataStub`) raises `NotImplementedError` with message pointing to future paid adapters
Short docstring or package README section documents extension point and out-of-scope paid APIs
Full test suite passes with no network access
uv run pytest passes
